title: Reading-order index script
glance: Adds understanding-index.mjs for numbered reading-order.md; deletes mandatory per-commit rule; adds light template.
backgroundDeep: Many commits → many docs. Without a numbered table, readers don't know where to start.
backgroundNarrow: Skill bundle described reading order; this commit automates it.
goal: npm run understanding:index → chronological table with skip/light/full tiers.
figure: git log→index.json→reading-order.md
intuition: Skipped commits still appear as rows with — so sequence gaps make sense.

steps.label: understanding-index.mjs
steps.body: Classify commits, link explainers, write branch reading-order.

steps.label: explainer-light.md
steps.body: Template for light tier: 2 quiz questions.
